get.description: Get daily nutrition goals.
Search or list foods in the personal database.

post.description: Create a new food in the personal database.

get.description: List recently logged foods.
Get a single food by ID.

patch.description: Update a food in the personal database.

delete.description: Delete a food. Pass force=true to delete even if diary entries reference it.

get.description: List diary entries for a given date.

post.description: Copy all diary entries from one date to another.

get.description: Get diary entries for a date range.
List recipes.
Get a single recipe by ID.

delete.description: Delete a recipe. Pass force=true to delete even if diary entries reference it.

get.description: List supplements. Pass all=true to include inactive ones.
Get today's supplement checklist.
Get supplement log history.
Get a single supplement by ID.

post.description: Log a supplement as taken today.
Log a supplement as taken on a specific date.

delete.description: Remove a supplement log entry for a specific date.

get.description: Get supplement checklist for a specific date.
Returns weight entries. When from/to query params are provided, returns trend data instead.
Get the most recent weight entry.
Get daily nutrition totals for a date range.
Get average daily nutrition over the past 7 days.
Get average daily nutrition over the past 30 days.
Get nutrition totals broken down by meal type.
Get most frequently logged foods.
Get current and longest logging streaks.
Get calendar view of logged days for a month.
Get day properties for a single date or a date range. Use date for single day, startDate/endDate for range.

200.description: Day properties or range of day properties

put.description: Set day properties (e.g. mark as fasting day).

delete.description: Delete day properties for a specific date.

get.description: Get user preferences.
List meal types.
List favorite foods and recipes.
Calculate maintenance calories for a date range.
Look up a product by barcode in Open Food Facts.
